tools.name: scan_website
tools.description: Scan any website for AI visibility and marketing health. Returns scores for GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), Multimodal readiness, Agent-Ready infrastructure, and 6-dimension Marketing Health. Identifies critical findings with prioritized fix recommendations and revenue impact estimates.

tools.description: Scan a competitor and return side-by-side comparison

tools.description: Get detailed line-item breakdown for a score dimension

tools.description: Submit a lead for service booking
